# R3BOOT

> Integrated recovery and performance clinic in Dadar, Mumbai.

R3BOOT is Mumbai's first integrated recovery and performance clinic, located in Dadar. We serve athletes, active adults, and people managing pain, injury, or stress through evidence-based recovery therapies and performance services.

## Services

- Physiotherapy — clinical assessment, manual therapy, sports rehab, post-surgery recovery
- Contrast Therapy — alternating Red Light Sauna and Ice Bath for recovery and resilience
- Hydrotherapy — aquatic rehabilitation in a low-impact therapeutic pool
- Sports Massage — performance-driven massage for athletes and active individuals
- Sports Psychology — mental performance coaching for athletes under pressure
- Counselling & Mental Training — integrated mental health and rehabilitation support

## Who We Help

- Athletes recovering from sports injuries
- Active adults managing chronic pain or post-surgical recovery
- People seeking faster recovery between training sessions
- Individuals managing stress, anxiety, or mental performance issues

## Location

Dadar, Mumbai, Maharashtra, India
Accessible from Andheri, Thane, Bandra, and central Mumbai

## Contact

Website: https://www.r3boot.in
